title: alsinopsis uniflora
intro: Alsinopsis uniflora, also known as the single-flowered alsinopsis, is a plant species within the balsam family. It has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Traditionally, Alsinopsis uniflora has been prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties.
